title: Career Opportunity Teacher at Schoolnet India

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Teacher at Schoolnet India
jsonLd.description:
Join the Schoolnet India family as a Teacher in Pune. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Schoolnet India:
Schoolnet India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Schoolnet India!
